channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/2)
channel.description: 今天的资讯里，关于“AI coding”的讨论几乎无处不在。大家不仅在**热议**新的编码工具和Agent，也在更深层次地**思考**程序员职业的未来。同时，几个新的开源项目也展示了AI Agent在法律、设计、金融等领域的落地可能。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的资讯里，关于“AI coding”的讨论几乎无处不在。大家不仅在**热议**新的编码工具和Agent，也在更深层次地**思考**程序员职业的未来。同时，几个新的开源项目也展示了AI Agent在法律、设计、金融等领域的落地可能。

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI. | 近期热门 | 总 12221 stars
item.author: nexu-io

item.title: denuitt1/mhr-cfw
item.description: A Domain-Fronting Relay that routes traffic though GAS (Google Apps Script) and forwards it to Cloudflare Workers. Designed to bypass DPI. | 近期热门 | 总 1331 stars
item.author: denuitt1

item.title: willchen96/mike
item.description: OSS AI Legal Platform | 近期热门 | 总 1107 stars
item.author: willchen96

item.title: Kianmhz/GooseRelayVPN
item.description: Socks5 VPN that tunnels raw TCP through Google Apps Script to your VPS exit server (AES‑256‑GCM, domain‑fronted). | 近期热门 | 总 519 stars
item.author: Kianmhz

item.title: sandeco/reversa
item.description: Transform legacy systems into executable specifications for AI coding agents | 近期热门 | 总 406 stars
item.author: sandeco

item.title: waybarrios/opencode-power-pack
item.description: Eleven Claude Code skills ported to OpenCode: code-review, security-review, feature-dev, frontend-design + 7 more. One config line, one plugin. | 近期热门 | 总 186 stars
item.author: waybarrios

item.title: endless-sky-team/ai-trading-agent
item.description: llm trading bot ai agent crypto bitcoin ethereum perpetuals openrouter lighter algorithmic automated quant typescript react postgres bun fintech defi machine-learning open-source crypto-bot signals | 近期热门 | 总 175 stars
item.author: endless-sky-team

item.title: WangQrkkk/PaperQuay
item.description: A desktop-first literature manager for PDF reading, translation, paper overviews, and AI agent workflows. | 近期热门 | 总 57 stars
item.author: WangQrkkk

item.title: zhu1090093659/deepseek-pp
item.description: 🧠 为 DeepSeek 网页版注入 Agentic 记忆系统 + Skill 技能系统的 Chrome 扩展 | 近期热门 | 总 51 stars
item.author: zhu1090093659
